briefing.ai_trends: Enterprise AI adoption is accelerating; 40% of applications expected to be powered by AI agents this year, up from <5% in 2025. Focus is shifting from training to inference, which now accounts for two-thirds of compute spend.
briefing.market_valuation: Global AI infrastructure investment projected to reach $1.4T in 2026; AI stocks now exceed 25% of S&P 500 capitalization.
briefing.infrastructure: Massive scaling in inference infrastructure; Agentic AI is becoming embedded directly into core platforms for autonomous operations like cloud cost optimization and security.
briefing.ai_search: AI chatbots increasingly replacing traditional health information searches, with 1 in 3 adults using them.
briefing.update_notes: Updated for March 25, 2026: Shift towards agentic AI, dominance of inference compute costs, and significant growth in enterprise autonomous operations.
